_doc: Curated guest reviews. Edit/extend here; build_trust_pages.py renders /reviews/ and inject_aggregate_rating.py attaches AggregateRating on /reviews/ only. review_count must equal len(reviews) — Google requires the count to match visibly rendered reviews. Names are first-name + initial for privacy.

reviews.author: Sophie M.
reviews.title: Best birthday day in Marbella
reviews.body: We rented the Mangusta 80 for my 35th. Pickup was right on time at Puerto Banús, the skipper knew every quiet anchorage, and the jet ski included was the icing on the cake. Andra responded on WhatsApp in under a minute every time. Worth every euro.

reviews.author: Marcus H.
reviews.title: Hen weekend — perfectly organised
reviews.body: Booked the Azimut 39 for my sister's hen on a Saturday in May. The crew helped us with the pink balloon arch we'd shipped over, kept the cava chilled, found dolphins offshore. The girls said it was the highlight of the whole weekend.

reviews.author: Jeremy R.
reviews.title: Proposal day — flawless coordination
reviews.body: Andra coordinated our proposal cruise to the last detail. The skipper anchored the boat exactly so La Concha was in the photo frame at sunset. The ring stayed safe in the galley fridge until the signal. She said yes.

reviews.author: Anneli V.
reviews.title: Family day with two kids
reviews.body: Took our two kids (5 and 8) out for the full day. Skipper was patient, the snorkel gear and donut were ready, we anchored in calm water for lunch. Even our nervous-of-the-sea grandma loved it.

reviews.author: James O.
reviews.title: Corporate day — exceeded expectations
reviews.body: Booked the Mangusta for 10 colleagues on a client incentive day. Catered lunch was excellent, the flybridge is huge, and the jet ski kept everyone entertained. Will rebook for next year.

reviews.author: Carla P.
reviews.title: Anniversary cruise — exactly what we wanted
reviews.body: Just my husband and I for our 10-year anniversary. The Astondoa is small enough to feel private, beautiful classic interior. Sunset over La Concha was unforgettable.

reviews.author: Daniel S.
reviews.title: Best day of our holiday
reviews.body: Family of 8 from Munich. The Mangusta felt like a private floating villa. Skipper found a quiet cove for swimming away from the crowds. Drinks fridge stocked exactly as promised.

reviews.author: Olivia T.
reviews.title: Booked last-minute, no compromise on service
reviews.body: Booked the Azimut on a Thursday for the Saturday — Andra confirmed the same evening on WhatsApp, full quote, no booking fees. Captain came with snacks already on board. Felt like we'd booked weeks ago.

reviews.author: Henry G.
reviews.title: Stag weekend — flexible and discreet
reviews.body: Crew handled a 9-man stag with humour and zero judgement. BYO was welcome, the bluetooth speaker worked perfectly, we made it back to Puerto Banús in time for dinner at Sea Grill. Top tier.

reviews.author: Lena B.
reviews.title: Photoshoot on board — bow looked unreal
reviews.body: Brand shoot for our swimwear line. Skipper anchored exactly where we wanted, held the boat steady for the golden-hour shots. La Concha in every photo. Andra recommended an excellent local photographer.

reviews.author: Patrick K.
reviews.title: Bachelor party — Mangusta lives up to the photos
reviews.body: 12 of us from Dublin. The Mangusta is a serious yacht — proper saloon, sun pads, jet ski, the lot. Six-hour charter felt like a full day. Skipper kept the playlist going.

reviews.author: Ines L.
reviews.title: Lovely cruise, lunch arrived a bit late
reviews.body: Beautiful boat, brilliant skipper, weather was perfect. Only minor: the catered lunch we'd added arrived 15 minutes after we'd anchored. Andra refunded the catering fee without us asking.

reviews.author: Markus E.
reviews.title: Spring trip — pleasant surprise
reviews.body: Came down in March expecting cool water. Skipper found a sheltered bay, the donut was a hit with the kids, and we ate lunch in the saloon when the wind picked up. Smart route planning.

reviews.author: Ruth A.
reviews.title: Corporate retreat — 12 directors, zero complaints
reviews.body: Hired the Mangusta for our board offsite. Bookings team handled the dietary needs, the skipper hit the schedule to the minute. The on-board catered fruit platter is genuinely the best I've seen.

reviews.author: Anouk D.
reviews.title: Sunset cruise — exactly as photos showed
reviews.body: Booked a 2-hour sunset cruise on the Azimut 39. Cava on ice when we boarded. Boat went exactly where the photos suggested. Easy, honest, no surprises.

reviews.author: Wouter J.
reviews.title: Best New Year's Eve cruise
reviews.body: Watched the Puerto Banús fireworks from the bow of the Mangusta. The captain anchored us perfectly for the show. Worth the premium NYE price.

reviews.author: Sara M.
reviews.title: Reservé en español — comunicación impecable
reviews.body: Quería reservar en español y Andra respondió en castellano sin problema. La Astondoa es una belleza. Recomendado para parejas.

reviews.author: Tom W.
reviews.title: Weather call was honest
reviews.body: Forecast turned at 8pm the night before. Skipper messaged at 9pm saying he'd rather move us 24h on for safer water. Full refund of any extras, no pressure. That's how you build trust.

reviews.author: Klara N.
reviews.title: Hochzeitsfeier auf dem Boot
reviews.body: Wir haben unsere Hochzeit auf der Astondoa gefeiert. Andra hat alles perfekt organisiert — vom Schmuck am Bug bis zum Champagner. Ein Tag, den wir nie vergessen werden.

reviews.author: Olivia C.
reviews.title: Best yacht in Marbella, full stop
reviews.body: Compared Mangusta 80 to 4-5 other 24m yachts on Click&Boat. This one was clearly better maintained, the skipper way more experienced, and the price was actually fair. WhatsApp booking saved us hours.
